attributes.description: Single HTTP API Gateway for skylight dev
attributes.name: skylight-dev-api

attributes.description: Backend application secrets for skylight dev environment including database credentials, API keys, and Lambda configuration. Values managed manually.
attributes.name: /mufgis/app/backend/d/skylight

attributes.description: Frontend application secrets for skylight dev environment including authentication keys, API endpoints, and client configuration. Values managed manually.
attributes.name: /mufgis/app/frontend/d/skylight

attributes.description: Security group for Lambda functions in private subnets
attributes.name: skylight-dev-lambda-sg

attributes.body:
swagger: "2.0"
info:
  title: "skylightapi.coforgemufg.com - dev API"
  description: "API Gateway for skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com (dev) GraphQL endpoints"
  version: "1.0.0"

schemes:
  - https
basePath: "/"

paths:
  /graphql/rbac:
    post:
      summary: "GraphQL endpoint for rbac service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "GraphQL response"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "aws_proxy"
        httpMethod: "POST"
        # 👇 IMPORTANT: This must be the API Gateway invoke URI (not just function ARN)
        uri: "arn:aws:apigateway:eu-west-1:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:700672899528:function:skylight-dev-lambda-rbac/invocations"
        passthroughBehavior: "when_no_match"
        timeoutInMillis: 29000
        contentHandling: "CONVERT_TO_TEXT"

    options:
      summary: "CORS preflight for rbac service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "CORS headers"
          headers:
            Access-Control-Allow-Origin:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Headers:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Methods:
              type: "string"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "mock"
        requestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            { "statusCode": 200 }
        responses:
          default:
            statusCode: "200"
            responseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'https://skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,Authorization'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
  /graphql/client:
    post:
      summary: "GraphQL endpoint for client service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "GraphQL response"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "aws_proxy"
        httpMethod: "POST"
        # 👇 IMPORTANT: This must be the API Gateway invoke URI (not just function ARN)
        uri: "arn:aws:apigateway:eu-west-1:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:700672899528:function:skylight-dev-lambda-client/invocations"
        passthroughBehavior: "when_no_match"
        timeoutInMillis: 29000
        contentHandling: "CONVERT_TO_TEXT"

    options:
      summary: "CORS preflight for client service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "CORS headers"
          headers:
            Access-Control-Allow-Origin:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Headers:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Methods:
              type: "string"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "mock"
        requestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            { "statusCode": 200 }
        responses:
          default:
            statusCode: "200"
            responseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'https://skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,Authorization'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
  /graphql/fund:
    post:
      summary: "GraphQL endpoint for fund service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "GraphQL response"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "aws_proxy"
        httpMethod: "POST"
        # 👇 IMPORTANT: This must be the API Gateway invoke URI (not just function ARN)
        uri: "arn:aws:apigateway:eu-west-1:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:700672899528:function:skylight-dev-lambda-fund/invocations"
        passthroughBehavior: "when_no_match"
        timeoutInMillis: 29000
        contentHandling: "CONVERT_TO_TEXT"

    options:
      summary: "CORS preflight for fund service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "CORS headers"
          headers:
            Access-Control-Allow-Origin:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Headers:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Methods:
              type: "string"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "mock"
        requestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            { "statusCode": 200 }
        responses:
          default:
            statusCode: "200"
            responseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'https://skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,Authorization'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
  /graphql/sla:
    post:
      summary: "GraphQL endpoint for sla service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "GraphQL response"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "aws_proxy"
        httpMethod: "POST"
        # 👇 IMPORTANT: This must be the API Gateway invoke URI (not just function ARN)
        uri: "arn:aws:apigateway:eu-west-1:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:700672899528:function:skylight-dev-lambda-sla/invocations"
        passthroughBehavior: "when_no_match"
        timeoutInMillis: 29000
        contentHandling: "CONVERT_TO_TEXT"

    options:
      summary: "CORS preflight for sla service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "CORS headers"
          headers:
            Access-Control-Allow-Origin:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Headers:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Methods:
              type: "string"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "mock"
        requestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            { "statusCode": 200 }
        responses:
          default:
            statusCode: "200"
            responseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'https://skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,Authorization'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
  /graphql/deliverables:
    post:
      summary: "GraphQL endpoint for deliverables service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "GraphQL response"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "aws_proxy"
        httpMethod: "POST"
        # 👇 IMPORTANT: This must be the API Gateway invoke URI (not just function ARN)
        uri: "arn:aws:apigateway:eu-west-1:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:700672899528:function:skylight-dev-lambda-deliverables/invocations"
        passthroughBehavior: "when_no_match"
        timeoutInMillis: 29000
        contentHandling: "CONVERT_TO_TEXT"

    options:
      summary: "CORS preflight for deliverables service"
      consumes:
        - application/json
      produces:
        - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: "CORS headers"
          headers:
            Access-Control-Allow-Origin:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Headers:
              type: "string"
            Access-Control-Allow-Methods:
              type: "string"
      x-amazon-apigateway-integration:
        type: "mock"
        requestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            { "statusCode": 200 }
        responses:
          default:
            statusCode: "200"
            responseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'https://skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,Authorization'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"

# Optional global CORS helper (REST ignores some OAS3 CORS, but keeping for clarity)
x-amazon-apigateway-cors:
  allowOrigins:
    - "https://skylight-coforge.coforgemufg.com"
  allowHeaders:
    - "Content-Type"
    - "Authorization"
  allowMethods:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"
    - "OPTIONS"
  allowCredentials: false
  maxAge: 86400
attributes.name: skylight-dev-rest-api

attributes.description: Origin Access Control for skylight dev S3
attributes.name: skylight-dev-oac-new

attributes.description: Security group for RDS, allows access only from VPC CIDR

ingress.description: Allow RDS Connection from Global Protect IPS
Inbound from Devops account for gitlab runners
